Title: Creation of the Gods I: Kingdom of Storms
Writer: Xixing Lu, Jianan Ran, Ping Ran
Actors: Huang Bo, Kris Phillips, Xuejian Li
Plot: Based on the most well-known classical fantasy novel of China, Fengshenyanyi, the trilogy is a magnificent eastern high fantasy epic that recreates the prolonged mythical wars between humans, immortals and monsters, which happened more than three thousand years ago.
